Comment: deploy results-api monitor mock endpoint with volatile ticker

commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose --env-file .env up -d --no-deps --build results-api'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && for i in $(seq 1 45); do status=$(docker inspect --format "{{if .State.Health}}{{.State.Health.Status}}{{else}}{{.State.Status}}{{end}}" election-results-api-1); echo results-api=$status; if [ "$status" = "healthy" ] || [ "$status" = "running" ]; then break; fi; sleep 2; done'

sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T results-api python - <<"PY"
from hermes.results_api.app import effective_monitor_mock_config
from hermes.results_api.governor_mock_ticker import load_final_fixture, fresh_mock_seed
mock = effective_monitor_mock_config()
fixture = load_final_fixture()
print({"mockEnabled": mock.get("enabled"), "mockTargetKey": mock.get("targetKey"), "fixtureDistricts": len(fixture.get("districts") or []), "freshSeed": fresh_mock_seed()})
PY'
curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/monitor | grep -q startMockButton && echo MONITOR_MOCK_UI=ok || (echo MONITOR_MOCK_UI=missing; exit 1)
curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/v1/monitor/source | grep -q '"mock"' && echo MONITOR_MOCK_API=ok || (echo MONITOR_MOCK_API=missing; exit 1)
